ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA-NeMo/Nemotron
Language: jupyter-notebook
Developer Asset Hub for NVIDIA Nemotron — A one-stop resource for training recipes, usage cookbooks, datasets, and full end-to-end reference examples to build with Nemotron models

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/GenerativeAIExamples
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/GenerativeAIExamples
Language: jupyter-notebook
Generative AI reference workflows optimized for accelerated infrastructure and microservice architecture.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NirDiamant/RAG_Techniques
Language: jupyter-notebook
This repository showcases various advanced techniques for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. RAG systems combine information retrieval with generative models to provide accurate and contextually rich responses.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/agents
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo for the Complete Agentic AI Engineering Course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov2
Language: jupyter-notebook
PyTorch code and models for the DINOv2 self-supervised learning method.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/segment-anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the SegmentAnything Model (SAM), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fchollet/deep-learning-with-python-notebooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fchollet/deep-learning-with-python-notebooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
Jupyter notebooks for the code samples of the book "Deep Learning with Python"

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-gemini/gemini-fullstack-langgraph-quickstart
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-fullstack-langgraph-quickstart
Language: jupyter-notebook
Get started with building Fullstack Agents using Gemini 2.5 and LangGraph

ns0:entry.ns0:title: google-gemini/gemma-cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/google-gemini/gemma-cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
A collection of guides and examples for the Gemma open models from Google.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mrdbourke/pytorch-deep-learning
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mrdbourke/pytorch-deep-learning
Language: jupyter-notebook
Materials for the Learn PyTorch for Deep Learning: Zero to Mastery course.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: patchy631/ai-engineering-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/patchy631/ai-engineering-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
In-depth tutorials on LLMs, RAGs and real-world AI agent applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unslothai/notebooks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unslothai/notebooks
Language: jupyter-notebook
250+ Fine-tuning & RL Notebooks for text, vision, audio, embedding, TTS models.
